/*  ** Add an object to the dtproperties table  */  create procedure dbo.dt_adduserobject  as   set nocount on   /*   ** Create the user object if it does not exist already   */   begin transaction    insert dbo.dtproperties (property) VALUES ('DtgSchemaOBJECT')    update dbo.dtproperties set objectid=@@identity      where id=@@identity and property='DtgSchemaOBJECT'   commit   return @@identity

create procedure dbo.dt_adduserobject_vcs      @vchProperty varchar(64)    as    set nocount on    declare @iReturn int      /*      ** Create the user object if it does not exist already      */      begin transaction          select @iReturn = objectid from dbo.dtproperties where property = @vchProperty          if @iReturn IS NULL          begin              insert dbo.dtproperties (property) VALUES (@vchProperty)              update dbo.dtproperties set objectid=@@identity                      where id=@@identity and property=@vchProperty              select @iReturn = @@identity          end      commit      return @iReturn

   @iVCSFlags     int = 0,      @iActionFlag   int = 0/* 0 => Checkout, 1 => GetLatest, 2 => UndoCheckOut */    as    set nocount on    declare @iReturn int  declare @iObjectId int  select @iObjectId =0    declare @VSSGUID varchar(100)  select @VSSGUID = 'SQLVersionControl.VCS_SQL'    declare @iReturnValue int  select @iReturnValue = 0    declare @vchTempText varchar(255)    /* this is for our strings */  declare @iStreamObjectId int  select @iStreamObjectId = 0        declare @iPropertyObjectId int      select @iPropertyObjectId = (select objectid from dbo.dtproperties where property = 'VCSProjectID')        declare @vchProjectName   varchar(255)      declare @vchSourceSafeINI varchar(255)      declare @vchServerName    varchar(255)      declare @vchDatabaseName  varchar(255)      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSProject',       @vchProjectName   OUT      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSourceSafeINI', @vchSourceSafeINI OUT      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLServer',     @vchServerName    OUT      exec dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs @iPropertyObjectId, 'VCSSQLDatabase',   @vchDatabaseName  OUT        if @chObjectType = 'PROC'      begin          /* Procedure Can have up to three streams             Drop Stream, Create Stream, GRANT stream */            exec @iReturn = sp_OACreate @VSSGUID, @iObjectId OUT            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError            exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iObjectId,                                      'CheckOut_StoredProcedure',                                      NULL,                                      @sProjectName = @vchProjectName,                                      @sSourceSafeINI = @vchSourceSafeINI,                                      @sObjectName = @vchObjectName,                                      @sServerName = @vchServerName,                                      @sDatabaseName = @vchDatabaseName,                                      @sComment = @vchComment,                                      @sLoginName = @vchLoginName,                                      @sPassword = @vchPassword,                                      @iVCSFlags = @iVCSFlags,                                      @iActionFlag = @iActionFlag            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError              exec @iReturn = sp_OAGetProperty @iObjectId, 'GetStreamObject', @iStreamObjectId OUT            if @iReturn <> 0 GOTO E_OAError            create table #commenttext (id int identity, sourcecode varchar(255))              select @vchTempText = 'STUB'          while @vchTempText IS NOT NULL          begin              exec @iReturn = sp_OAMethod @iStreamObjectId, 'GetStream', @iReturnValue OUT, @vchTempText OUT              if @iReturn <> 0 CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.dt_displayoaerror      @iObject int,      @iresult int  as    set nocount on    declare @vchOutput      varchar(255)  declare @hr             int  declare @vchSource      varchar(255)  declare @vchDescription varchar(255)        exec @hr = sp_OAGetErrorInfo @iObject, @vchSource OUT, @vchDescription OUT        select @vchOutput = @vchSource + ': ' + @vchDescription      raiserror (@vchOutput,16,-1)        return

/*  ** Drop one or all the associated properties of an object or an attribute   **  ** dt_dropproperties objid, null or '' -- drop all properties of the object itself  ** dt_dropproperties objid, property -- drop the property  */  create procedure dbo.dt_droppropertiesbyid   @id int,   @property varchar(64)  as   set nocount on     if (@property is null) or (@property = '')    delete from dbo.dtproperties where objectid=@id   else    delete from dbo.dtproperties      where objectid=@id and property=@property
/*  ** Drop an object from the dbo.dtproperties table  */  create procedure dbo.dt_dropuserobjectbyid   @id int  as   set nocount on   delete from dbo.dtproperties where objectid=@id

/*   ** Generate an ansi name that is unique in the dtproperties.value column   */   create procedure dbo.dt_generateansiname(@name varchar(255) output)   as    declare @prologue varchar(20)    declare @indexstring varchar(20)    declare @index integer       set @prologue = 'MSDT-A-'    set @index = 1       while 1 = 1    begin     set @indexstring = cast(@index as varchar(20))     set @name = @prologue + @indexstring     if not exists (select value from dtproperties where value = @name)      break          set @index = @index + 1        if (@index = 10000)      goto TooMany    end      Leave:       return      TooMany:       set @name = 'DIAGRAM'    goto Leave

/*  ** Retrieve the owner object(s) of a given property  */  create procedure dbo.dt_getobjwithprop   @property varchar(30),   @value varchar(255)  as   set nocount on     if (@property is null) or (@property = '')   begin    raiserror('Must specify a property name.',-1,-1)    return (1)   end     if (@value is null)    select objectid id from dbo.dtproperties     where property=@property     else    select objectid id from dbo.dtproperties     where property=@property and value=@value

/*  ** Retrieve the owner object(s) of a given property  */  create procedure dbo.dt_getobjwithprop_u   @property varchar(30),   @uvalue nvarchar(255)  as   set nocount on     if (@property is null) or (@property = '')   begin    raiserror('Must specify a property name.',-1,-1)    return (1)   end     if (@uvalue is null)    select objectid id from dbo.dtproperties     where property=@property     else    select objectid id from dbo.dtproperties     where property=@property and uvalue=@uvalue

/*  ** Retrieve properties by id's  **  ** dt_getproperties objid, null or '' -- retrieve all properties of the object itself  ** dt_getproperties objid, property -- retrieve the property specified  */  create procedure dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid   @id int,   @property varchar(64)  as   set nocount on     if (@property is null) or (@property = '')    select property, version, value, lvalue     from dbo.dtproperties     where  @id=objectid   else    select property, version, value, lvalue     from dbo.dtproperties     where  @id=objectid and @property=property

/*  ** Retrieve properties by id's  **  ** dt_getproperties objid, null or '' -- retrieve all properties of the object itself  ** dt_getproperties objid, property -- retrieve the property specified  */  create procedure dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_u   @id int,   @property varchar(64)  as   set nocount on     if (@property is null) or (@property = '')    select property, version, uvalue, lvalue     from dbo.dtproperties     where  @id=objectid   else    select property, version, uvalue, lvalue     from dbo.dtproperties     where  @id=objectid and @property=property

create procedure dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs      @id       int,      @property varchar(64),      @value    varchar(255) = NULL OUT    as        set nocount on        select @value = (          select value                  from dbo.dtproperties                  where @id=objectid and @property=property                  )

create procedure dbo.dt_getpropertiesbyid_vcs_u      @id       int,      @property varchar(64),      @value    nvarchar(255) = NULL OUT    as        set nocount on        select @value = (          select uvalue                  from dbo.dtproperties                  where @id=objectid and @property=property                  )

/*  ** If the property already exists, reset the value; otherwise add property  **  id -- the id in sysobjects of the object  **  property -- the name of the property  **  uvalue -- the text value of the property  **  lvalue -- the binary value of the property (image)  */  create procedure dbo.dt_setpropertybyid_u   @id int,   @property varchar(64),   @uvalue nvarchar(255),   @lvalue image  as   set nocount on   --    -- If we are writing the name property, find the ansi equivalent.    -- If there is no lossless translation, generate an ansi name.    --    declare @avalue varchar(255)    set @avalue = null    if (@uvalue is not null)    begin     if (convert(nvarchar(255), convert(varchar(255), @uvalue)) = @uvalue)     begin      set @avalue = convert(varchar(255), @uvalue)     end     else     begin      if 'DtgSchemaNAME' = @property      begin       exec dbo.dt_generateansiname @avalue output      end     end    end    if exists (select * from dbo.dtproperties      where objectid=@id and property=@property)   begin    --    -- bump the version count for this row as we update it    --    update dbo.dtproperties set value=@avalue, uvalue=@uvalue, lvalue=@lvalue, version=version+1     where objectid=@id and property=@property   end   else   begin    --    -- version count is auto-set to 0 on initial insert    --    insert dbo.dtproperties (property, objectid, value, uvalue, lvalue)     values (@property, @id, @avalue, @uvalue, @lvalue)   end

create procedure dbo.[sel_FE7EAB053E2347A666549F3C53174942] (@tablenick int, @max_rows int = NULL,   @guidlast uniqueidentifier = NULL)    AS     set nocount on   set rowcount 0   if  @max_rows is not null    begin    -- used to select data for initial pop. of subscriber for dynamic filtered publication    set rowcount @max_rows    declare @lin varbinary (255)    declare @cv varbinary (2048)    declare @replnick int    declare @objid int    declare @ccols int      select @objid = objid from sysmergearticles where nickname = @tablenick    select @ccols = max(colid) from syscolumns where id = @objid        exec dbo.sp_MSgetreplnick @nickname = @replnick out    if (@@error <> 0) or @replnick IS NULL             begin           RAISERROR (14055, 11, -1)           RETURN(1)           end                        set @lin = { fn UPDATELINEAGE(0x0, @replnick) }       set @cv = { fn INITCOLVS(@ccols, @replnick) }      select @tablenick, v.[rowguid], coalesce (c.generation,1),      coalesce (c.lineage, @lin), coalesce (c.colv1, @cv), * from [dbo].[MYINDAIA_TPO_ITEM_VIEW] v left outer join  MSmerge_contents c on         v.[rowguid] = c.rowguid and c.tablenick = @tablenick where v.[rowguid] > @guidlast         order by v.[rowguid]    return (1)      end   insert into #belong (tablenick, rowguid, flag, partchangegen, joinchangegen)    select ct.tablenick, ct.rowguid, 0, ct.partchangegen, ct.joinchangegen       from  MSmerge_contents ct, #genlist g, [dbo].[MYINDAIA_TPO_ITEM_VIEW] v where ct.tablenick = @tablenick       and ct.generation = g.generation        and ct.rowguid = v.[rowguid]      UNION      select ct.tablenick, ct.rowguid, 0, ct.partchangegen, ct.joinchangegen       from  MSmerge_contents ct, #genlist g, [dbo].[MYINDAIA_TPO_ITEM_VIEW] v where ct.tablenick = @tablenick       and ct.partchangegen = g.generation       and ct.rowguid = v.[rowguid]     if @@ERROR <> 0    begin    RAISERROR('Error selecting from view' , 16, -1)    return (1)     end

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_alterdiagram   (    @diagramname  sysname,    @owner_id int = null,    @version  int,    @definition  varbinary(max)   )   WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    set nocount on       declare @theId    int    declare @retval   int    declare @IsDbo    int        declare @UIDFound   int    declare @DiagId   int    declare @ShouldChangeUID int       if(@diagramname is null)    begin     RAISERROR ('Invalid ARG', 16, 1)     return -1    end       execute as caller;    select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();      select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');     if(@owner_id is null)     select @owner_id = @theId;    revert;       select @ShouldChangeUID = 0    select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname         if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @theId <> @UIDFound))    begin     RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1);     return -3    end       if(@IsDbo <> 0)    begin     if(@UIDFound is null or USER_NAME(@UIDFound) is null) -- invalid principal_id     begin      select @ShouldChangeUID = 1 ;     end    end      -- update dds data       update dbo.sysdiagrams set definition = @definition where diagram_id = @DiagId ;      -- change owner    if(@ShouldChangeUID = 1)     update dbo.sysdiagrams set principal_id = @theId where diagram_id = @DiagId ;      -- update dds version    if(@version is not null)     update dbo.sysdiagrams set version = @version where diagram_id = @DiagId ;      return 0   END

     AND F.NR_ITEM     = @nr_item                AND SE.CD_SERVICO = @cd_servico                AND SE.CD_EVENTO  = F.CD_EVENTO                AND SE.NR_ORDEM  <> F.NR_ORDEM)    BEGIN     --atualiza a ordem dos eventos no fup do processo e apaga todas as previsões e datas limite      UPDATE F SET        DT_PREVISTA = NULL,        DT_LIMITE   = NULL,        NR_ORDEM    = SE.NR_ORDEM      FROM TFLP_PO_ITEM F (NOLOCK), TSERVICO_EVENTO SE (NOLOCK)      WHERE F.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo       AND F.CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa       AND F.NR_ITEM     = @nr_item        AND SE.CD_SERVICO = @cd_servico        AND SE.CD_EVENTO  = F.CD_EVENTO    END    ELSE    BEGIN      --apaga todas as previsões e datas limite      UPDATE TFLP_PO_ITEM SET        DT_PREVISTA = NULL,        DT_LIMITE   = NULL      WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo       AND CD_EMPRESA  = @cd_empresa       AND NR_ITEM     = @nr_item    END      SELECT @in_hora_eventos  = ISNULL(IN_HORA_EVENTOS, 0)  FROM BROKER.DBO.TCLIENTE_SERVICO CS (NOLOCK)     INNER JOIN BROKER.DBO.TPROCESSO P (NOLOCK) ON P.CD_SERVICO  = CS.CD_SERVICO                                      AND P.CD_CLIENTE  = CS.CD_CLIENTE                                      AND P.CD_UNID_NEG = CS.CD_UNID_NEG                                      AND P.CD_PRODUTO  = CS.CD_PRODUTO  WHERE P.NR_REFERENCIA = @nr_processo    AND P.CD_CLIENTE    = @cd_empresa    AND P.CD_PRODUTO    <> '01'      --seleciona a qtde de dias para conclusão, se nulo atribui 0(zero)    --e seleciona o codigo do evento conclusor da tabela de parametros    SELECT      @nr_dias_conclusao = ISNULL( NR_DIAS_CONCLUSAO_PO, 0 ),      @cd_ev_conclusor   = CD_EVENTO_CONCLUSOR_PO    FROM BROKER.DBO.TPARAMETROS (NOLOCK)        -- Determina Limites para Evento Base    DECLARE cPrevisto CURSOR LOCAL FOR      SELE

/***** CALCULO DE DIAS A COBRAR/CORRIDOS DE DEMURRAGE *****/  --/*  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_calc_dias_cntr] (     @nr_processo      char(18),     @nr_cntr          char(20),     @nr_dias_corridos int OUTPUT,     @nr_dias_cobrar   int OUTPUT  ) AS  --*/  /*  SET XACT_ABORT ON  BEGIN TRAN    DECLARE @nr_processo      char(18)  DECLARE @nr_cntr          char(20)  DECLARE @nr_dias_corridos int  DECLARE @nr_dias_cobrar   int    SELECT @nr_processo = '0101IM-002235-15'  SELECT @nr_cntr     = 'HLXU5290814'  --*/    DECLARE    @dt_ent       datetime,    @dt_devolucao datetime,    @dt_demurrage datetime,    @dt_ini       datetime,    @dt_fim       datetime,    @dt_temp      datetime,    @nr_free_time int,    @nr_dias      int,    @tp_dias      char(1)    SELECT    @dt_ent       = DT_ENT,    @dt_devolucao = DT_DEVOLUCAO_CNTR,    @nr_free_time = ISNULL(NR_FREE_TIME, 0),    @tp_dias      = TP_DIAS  FROM TPROCESSO_CNTR (NOLOCK)  WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo    AND NR_CNTR     = @nr_cntr    IF @dt_devolucao IS NULL  BEGIN    SET @dt_ini = @dt_ent    SET @dt_fim = CONVERT(datetime, CONVERT(varchar(10), GETDATE(), 103), 103)  END  ELSE  BEGIN    SET @dt_ini = @dt_ent    SET @dt_fim = @dt_devolucao  END    --IF @dt_ini > @dt_fim Print 'deu merda'    --RETURN 0    -- Calculando Dt. da Demurrage  SET @nr_dias      = 0  SET @dt_demurrage = @dt_ent    IF @tp_dias = '3'    SET @dt_temp = @dt_ent  ELSE    SET @dt_temp = @dt_ent + 1    WHILE @nr_dias <> @nr_free_time  BEGIN    IF @tp_dias <> '2'      SET @nr_dias = @nr_dias + 1     ELSE      IF (DATEPART(dw, @dt_temp) NOT IN (1, 7)) AND ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK) WHERE DT_FERIADO = CONVERT(datetime, @dt_temp, 103)) = 0)        SET @nr_dias = @nr_dias + 1        SET @dt_temp = @dt_temp + 1  END    SET @dt_demurrage = @dt_temp - 1    -- Calcular Dias Corridos e a Cobrar  SET @nr_dias_corridos = 0  SET @nr_dias_cobrar   = 0    -- Contar dias e Descontar Sábados, Domingos e Feriados dos Dias Corridos/Cobrar quando necessário  SET @dt_temp = @dt_ini + 1  WHILE CONVERT(DATE, @dt_temp) <> CONVERT(DATE, (@dt_fim + 1))  BEGIN       IF DATEPART(dw, @dt_temp) IN (1, 7) -- Sábado e Domingo      BEGIN   IF @tp_dias <> '2'    BEGIN      SET @nr_dias_corridos = @nr_dias_corridos + 1      IF @dt_temp > @dt_demurrage     SET @nr_dias_cobrar = @nr_dias_cobrar + 1    END   END    ELSE   BEGIN    IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK) WHERE DT_FERIADO = CONVERT(datetime, @dt_temp, 103)) > 0 -- Feriado      BEGIN       IF @tp_dias <> '2'        BEGIN       SET @nr_dias_corridos = @nr_dias_corridos + 1       IF @dt_temp > @dt_demurrage         SET @nr_dias_cobrar = @nr_dias_cobrar + 1        END      END      ELSE -- Dia Normal    BEGIN       SET @nr_dias_corridos = @nr_dias_corridos + 1      IF @dt_temp > @dt_demurrage     SET @nr_dias_cobrar = @nr_dias_cobrar + 1    END      END    SET @dt_temp = @dt_temp + 1  END    IF @tp_dias = '3'    SET @nr_dias_corridos = @nr_dias_corridos + 1    /*  SELECT @nr_dias_corridos   SELECT @nr_dias_cobrar       ROLLBACK TRAN  SET XACT_ABORT OFF  --*/

/**/  CREATE PROCEDURE sp_calc_dias_uteis (    @dt_ini datetime,    @nr_dia integer,    @dt_fim datetime OUTPUT  ) AS  --*/  /*  DECLARE    @dt_ini datetime,    @nr_dia integer,    @dt_fim datetime  SET @dt_ini = CONVERT( datetime, '19/12/2006', 103 )  SET @nr_dia = 30  --*/  SET NOCOUNT ON    DECLARE    @dt_temp datetime,    @nr_dia_aux int    SET @dt_temp = @dt_ini  SET @nr_dia_aux = 0    WHILE @nr_dia > @nr_dia_aux  BEGIN    IF (DATEPART(dw, @dt_temp) IN (2,3,4,5,6)) AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK) WHERE DT_FERIADO = CONVERT(datetime, @dt_temp, 103 )) = 0      SET @nr_dia_aux = @nr_dia_aux + 1              SET @dt_temp = @dt_temp + 1  END    SET @dt_fim = @dt_temp  --select @dt_temp  SET NOCOUNT OFF

/**/    CREATE PROCEDURE [DBO].[SP_CALC_DIAS_UTEIS_KPI] (      @TP_DIA CHAR(1),      @DT_INI DATETIME ,      @DT_FIM DATETIME,      @NR_DIA INT OUTPUT    ) AS    --*/    /*    DECLARE      @TP_DIA CHAR(1),      @DT_INI DATETIME,      @DT_FIM DATETIME,      @NR_DIA INT        SET @TP_DIA = '1'    SET @DT_INI = CONVERT( DATETIME, '23/03/2007', 103 )    SET @DT_FIM = CONVERT( DATETIME, '25/03/2007', 103 )    --*/    --SET XACT_ABORT ON    SET NOCOUNT ON        DECLARE @DT_TEMP DATETIME        SET @DT_INI = CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_INI, 103),103)    SET @DT_FIM = CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_FIM, 103),103)        PRINT 'DATAS'    PRINT @DT_INI    PRINT @DT_FIM        --DIFERENÇA DE DIAS ENTRE A DATA INICIAL E A FINAL    SET @NR_DIA = DATEDIFF( D, @DT_INI, @DT_FIM )        IF @NR_DIA > 0 BEGIN          --QDO A DIFERENÇA DE DIAS FOR MAIOR QUE ZERO      IF @TP_DIA = '1'     BEGIN          SET @DT_TEMP = @DT_INI                WHILE @DT_TEMP <> @DT_FIM + 1      BEGIN        IF DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @DT_TEMP) IN (1, 7)         SET @NR_DIA = @NR_DIA - 1                   SET @DT_TEMP = @DT_TEMP + 1        END            SELECT @NR_DIA = @NR_DIA - COUNT(*)         FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK)          WHERE DT_FERIADO BETWEEN @DT_INI AND @DT_FIM          AND DATEPART(WEEKDAY, DT_FERIADO) NOT IN (1, 7)      END    END    ELSE    IF @NR_DIA < 0   BEGIN      --QDO A DIFERENCA DE DIAS FOR MENOR QUE ZERO      IF @TP_DIA = '1'     BEGIN          SET @DT_TEMP = @DT_INI               WHILE @DT_TEMP <> @DT_FIM + 1      BEGIN            IF DATEPART(WEEKDAY, @DT_TEMP) IN (1, 7)     SET @NR_DIA = @NR_DIA + 1          SET @DT_TEMP = @DT_TEMP - 1        END                SELECT @NR_DIA = @NR_DIA + COUNT(*)         FROM TFERIADO (NOLOCK)          WHERE DT_FERIADO BETWEEN @DT_FIM AND @DT_INI           AND DATEPART(WEEKDAY, DT_FERIADO) NOT IN (1, 7)      END    END        /*PRINT 'I:'+CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_INI, 103)     PRINT 'F:'+ CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_FIM, 103)    PRINT 'I:'+CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_INI, 103) +' - F:'+ CONVERT(VARCHAR, @DT_FIM, 103) +' = '+ CAST(@NR_DIA AS VARCHAR)*/    SET NOCOUNT OFF    --SET XACT_ABORT OFF

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_creatediagram   (    @diagramname  sysname,    @owner_id  int = null,      @version   int,    @definition  varbinary(max)   )   WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    set nocount on       declare @theId int    declare @retval int    declare @IsDbo int    declare @userName sysname    if(@version is null or @diagramname is null)    begin     RAISERROR (N'E_INVALIDARG', 16, 1);     return -1    end       execute as caller;    select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();     select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');    revert;         if @owner_id is null    begin     select @owner_id = @theId;    end    else    begin     if @theId <> @owner_id     begin      if @IsDbo = 0      begin       RAISERROR (N'E_INVALIDARG', 16, 1);       return -1      end      select @theId = @owner_id     end    end    -- next 2 line only for test, will be removed after define name unique    if EXISTS(select diagram_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @theId and name = @diagramname)    begin     RAISERROR ('The name is already used.', 16, 1);     return -2    end       insert into dbo.sysdiagrams(name, principal_id , version, definition)      VALUES(@diagramname, @theId, @version, @definition) ;        select @retval = @@IDENTITY     return @retval   END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_dropdiagram   (    @diagramname  sysname,    @owner_id int = null   )   WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    set nocount on    declare @theId    int    declare @IsDbo    int        declare @UIDFound   int    declare @DiagId   int       if(@diagramname is null)    begin     RAISERROR ('Invalid value', 16, 1);     return -1    end       EXECUTE AS CALLER;    select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();    select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');     if(@owner_id is null)     select @owner_id = @theId;    REVERT;         select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname     if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @UIDFound <> @theId))    begin     RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1)     return -3    end       delete from dbo.sysdiagrams where diagram_id = @DiagId;       return 0;   END

/************************* ESTATISTICAS - RELATORIOS *******************************/    /*    OBJETIVO: Criar relatórios de estatisticas de utilização dos relatórios por usuário.        Autor: Alexandre Gonçalves Neto    Criado: 22/09/2006        Manutenção:    */    /**/    CREATE PROCEDURE sp_estat_menu_user (      @cd_mes integer,      @cd_ano integer    ) AS    --*/    /*    SET XACT_ABORT ON    BEGIN TRAN        DECLARE      @cd_mes integer,      @cd_ano integer        SET @cd_mes = 8    SET @cd_ano = 2006    --*/    --cria estatisticas por menu    CREATE TABLE #TESTATISCA_MENU (      CD_MENU char(2),      CD_SUBM char(2),      CD_USUARIO char(4),      VL_TOTAL integer DEFAULT(0),      VL_CHEIO integer DEFAULT(0),      VL_VAZIO integer DEFAULT(0),      VL_PER_CHEIO float    )    --seleciona o total de consultas    INSERT INTO #TESTATISCA_MENU ( VL_TOTAL, CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO )    SELECT COUNT(*), R.CD_MENU, R.CD_SUBM, R.CD_USUARIO    FROM TRELATORIOS R (NOLOCK)    WHERE DATEPART(mm, R.DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_mes      AND DATEPART(yy, R.DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_ano    GROUP BY R.CD_MENU, R.CD_SUBM, R.CD_USUARIO        --seleciona o total de consultas que obtiveram resultados    UPDATE #TESTATISCA_MENU SET      VL_CHEIO = ISNULL(R.VL_TOTAL, 0)    FROM (  SELECT COUNT(*) AS VL_TOTAL, CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO            FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)            WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'              AND DATEPART(mm, DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_mes              AND DATEPART(yy, DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_ano            GROUP BY CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO      ) R, #TESTATISCA_MENU E    WHERE R.CD_MENU = E.CD_MENU      AND R.CD_SUBM = E.CD_SUBM      AND R.CD_USUARIO = E.CD_USUARIO        --seleciona o total de consultas que não obtiveram resultados    UPDATE #TESTATISCA_MENU SET      VL_VAZIO = ISNULL(R.VL_TOTAL, 0)    FROM (  SELECT COUNT(*) AS VL_TOTAL, CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO            FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)            WHERE IN_DADOS = '0'              AND DATEPART(mm, DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_mes              AND DATEPART(yy, DT_EMISSAO) = @cd_ano            GROUP BY CD_MENU, CD_SUBM, CD_USUARIO      ) R, #TESTATISCA_MENU E    WHERE R.CD_MENU = E.CD_MENU      AND R.CD_SUBM = E.CD_SUBM      AND R.CD_USUARIO = E.CD_USUARIO        --verifica se já existem registros para o ano/mes corrente    IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM M15_ESTAT_MENU (NOLOCK) WHERE M15_NR_ANO = @cd_ano AND M15_NR_MES = @cd_mes) > 0    BEGIN      --apaga os registros e re-calcula      DELETE M15_ESTAT_MENU WHERE M15_NR_ANO = @cd_ano AND M15_NR_MES = @cd_mes    END    --insere na tabela de estatistica    INSERT INTO M15_ESTAT_MENU (      M15_NR_ANO, M15_NR_MES, M15_CD_MENU, M15_CD_SUBM, M15_CD_USUARIO, M15_CD_CARGO, M15_CD_GRUPO,      M15_VL_TOTAL, M15_VL_CHEIO, M15_VL_VAZIO, M15_VL_PER_CHEIO    )    SELECT       @cd_ano, @cd_mes, E.CD_MENU, E.CD_SUBM, E.CD_USUARIO, U.CD_CARGO,      CASE         WHEN U.CD_CARGO IN ('040','055','060') THEN          (            SELECT TOP 1 GC.CD_GRUPO            FROM TPERMISSAO PC (NOLOCK),                TEMPRESA_NAC EN (NOLOCK),                TGRUPO GC (NOLOCK)            WHERE PC.CD_USUARIO = E.CD_USUARIO              AND PC.CD_CLIENTE = EN.CD_EMPRESA              AND EN.CD_GRUPO   = GC.CD_GRUPO            GROUP BY GC.CD_GRUPO            ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC          )      END,      E.VL_TOTAL, E.VL_CHEIO, E.VL_VAZIO, ((VL_CHEIO * 100) / VL_TOTAL)    FROM #TESTATISCA_MENU E,        TUSUARIO U (NOLOCK)    WHERE E.CD_USUARIO = U.CD_USUARIO        DROP TABLE #TESTATISCA_MENU        /*------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/    --cria estatisticas por usuário    DECLARE      @cd_menu   char(2),      @cd_subm   char(2),      @nm_coluna char(16),      @tx_update nvarchar(1024)        --verifica se já existem registros para o ano/mes corrente    IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM M16_ESTAT_USER (nolock) WHERE M16_NR_ANO = @cd_ano AND M16_NR_MES = @cd_mes) > 0    BEGIN      --apaga os registros e re-calcula      DELETE M16_ESTA

/**/  CREATE PROCEDURE sp_estat_total_geral (    @vl_total_ano     integer output,    @vl_total_mes     integer output,    @vl_total_sem     integer output,    @vl_total_dia     integer output,    @vl_total_ano_ant integer output,    @vl_total_mes_ant integer output,    @vl_total_sem_ant integer output,    @vl_total_dia_ant integer output,    @vl_top_dia       integer output,    @dt_top_dia       datetime output  ) AS  --*/  /*  DECLARE    @vl_total_ano int,    @vl_total_mes int,    @vl_total_sem int,    @vl_total_dia int,    @vl_total_ano_ant int,    @vl_total_mes_ant int,    @vl_total_sem_ant int,    @vl_total_dia_ant int,    @vl_top_dia int,    @dt_top_dia datetime  --*/  DECLARE    @hoje datetime,    @wday integer    --seleciona o dia da semana  SET @hoje = CONVERT(datetime, CONVERT(varchar(10), GETDATE(), 103), 103)  SET @wday = DATEPART(dw, GETDATE())    --seleciona o total de consultas do ano corrente  SELECT @vl_total_ano = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DATEPART(yyyy, DT_EMISSAO) = YEAR(@hoje)    --seleciona o total de consultas do mes corrente  SELECT @vl_total_mes = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DATEPART(yyyy, DT_EMISSAO) = YEAR(@hoje)    AND DATEPART(m, DT_EMISSAO)    = MONTH(@hoje)    --seleciona o total de consultas da semana corrente  SELECT @vl_total_sem = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DT_EMISSAO BETWEEN DATEADD(Day, -(@wday-1), @hoje) AND @hoje    --seleciona o total de consultas do dia  SELECT @vl_total_dia = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DT_EMISSAO = @hoje    /* ANO, MES e SEMANA PASSADOS */    --seleciona o total de consultas do ano passado  SELECT @vl_total_ano_ant = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DATEPART(yyyy, DT_EMISSAO) = YEAR(@hoje)-1    --seleciona o total de consultas do mes passado  IF MONTH(@hoje) = 1  BEGIN    SELECT @vl_total_mes_ant = COUNT(*)    FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)    WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'      AND DATEPART(yyyy, DT_EMISSAO) = YEAR(@hoje)-1      AND DATEPART(m, DT_EMISSAO)    = 12  END  ELSE  BEGIN    SELECT @vl_total_mes_ant = COUNT(*)    FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)    WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'      AND DATEPART(yyyy, DT_EMISSAO) = YEAR(@hoje)      AND DATEPART(m, DT_EMISSAO)    = MONTH(@hoje)-1  END    --seleciona o total de consultas da semana passada  SELECT @vl_total_sem_ant = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DT_EMISSAO BETWEEN DATEADD(Day, -(@wday+6), @hoje) AND DATEADD(Day, -@wday, @hoje)    --seleciona o total de consultas de ontem  SELECT @vl_total_dia_ant = COUNT(*)  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'    AND DT_EMISSAO = DATEADD(Day, -1, @hoje)    --seleciona o dia que mais consultas foram realizadas  SELECT TOP 1 @vl_top_dia = COUNT(*), @dt_top_dia = DT_EMISSAO  FROM TRELATORIOS (NOLOCK)  WHERE IN_DADOS = '1'  GROUP BY DT_EMISSAO  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC    /*  SELECT    @vl_total_ano AS ANO,    @vl_total_mes AS MES,    @vl_total_sem AS SEM,    @vl_total_dia AS DIA,    @vl_total_ano_ant AS ANO_A,    @vl_total_mes_ant AS MES_A,    @vl_total_sem_ant AS SEM_A,    @vl_total_dia_ant AS DIA_A,    @vl_top_dia AS VL_DIA_TOP,    @dt_top_dia AS DT_DIA_TOP  --*/

@TABLE_NAME     VARCHAR(MAX),              @CSV_COLUMN     VARCHAR(MAX),              @QUOTED_DATA    VARCHAR(MAX),              @TEXT           VARCHAR(MAX),              @FILTER         VARCHAR(MAX),        @IDQUERY        VARCHAR(MAX),        @SQL_ON         VARCHAR(100) = '',        @SQL_OFF        VARCHAR(100) = '',              @IDENTITY_TABLE BIT            DECLARE @EXCLUDEDLIST TABLE(NAME VARCHAR(MAX))      DECLARE @RESULT       TABLE(INSERTS VARCHAR(MAX))            SET @TABLE_NAME = @TABLENAME      SET @FILTER     = @FILTER_CONDITION      SET @COLUMNS    = REPLACE((REPLACE(@COLUMNS, '[', '''')), ']', '''')            IF LEN(@COLUMNS) > 0      SET @IDQUERY    = 'SELECT ''''+ NAME +'''' FROM SYS.ALL_COLUMNS WHERE OBJECT_ID = OBJECT_ID('''+@TABLENAME+''') AND NAME IN ('+@COLUMNS+')'            INSERT INTO @EXCLUDEDLIST              EXEC(@IDQUERY)                   SELECT @IDENTITY_TABLE = ISNULL( (SELECT 1         FROM SYS.ALL_COLUMNS         WHERE OBJECT_ID = OBJECT_ID(@TABLE_NAME)           AND IS_IDENTITY = 1 ) , 0)            IF @IDENTITY_TABLE = 1      BEGIN        SET @SQL_ON  = '-- SET IDENTITY_INSERT ' + @TABLE_NAME + ' ON '        SET @SQL_OFF = '-- SET IDENTITY_INSERT ' + @TABLE_NAME + ' OFF '      END                 SELECT @CSV_COLUMN=STUFF      (          (           SELECT ',['+ NAME +']'           FROM SYS.ALL_COLUMNS             WHERE OBJECT_ID = OBJECT_ID(@TABLE_NAME)            AND ( ( (IS_IDENTITY != 1) AND (@IDENTITY = 0) ) OR (@IDENTITY = 1) )            AND NAME NOT IN (SELECT NAME FROM @EXCLUDEDLIST)          FOR XML PATH('')           ),1,1,''      )            SELECT @QUOTED_DATA=STUFF      (          (           SELECT ' ISNULL(QUOTENAME('+CASE WHEN UPPER(B.NAME) = 'DATETIME' THEN 'CONVERT(VARCHAR,' + A.NAME +',21)' ELSE A.NAME END+','+QUOTENAME('''','''''')+'),'+'''NULL'''+')+'','''+'+'           FROM SYS.ALL_COLUMNS a          LEFT JOIN SYS.TYPES B ON B.system_type_id = A.system_type_id            WHERE OBJECT_ID=OBJECT_ID(@TABLE_NAME)            AND ( ( (IS_IDENTITY != 1) AND (@IDENTITY = 0) ) OR (@IDENTITY = 1) )         AND A.NAME NOT IN (SELECT NAME FROM @EXCLUDEDLIST)          FOR XML PATH('')          ),1,1,''      )      --SELECT @QUOTED_DATA      SELECT @TEXT= 'SELECT ''INSERT INTO '+@TABLE_NAME+'('+@CSV_COLUMN+')VALUES('''+'+'+SUBSTRING(@QUOTED_DATA,1,LEN(@QUOTED_DATA)-5)+'+'+''')'''+' FROM '+@TABLE_NAME + ' ' + @FILTER                --SELECT @CSV_COLUMN AS CSV_COLUMN,@QUOTED_DATA AS QUOTED_DATA,@TEXT TEXT      --SELECT @TEXT            IF LEN(@SQL_ON) > 0      INSERT INTO @RESULT       SELECT  @SQL_ON  + CHAR(13)             INSERT INTO @RESULT      EXEC (@TEXT)            IF LEN(@SQL_OFF) > 0      INSERT INTO @RESULT      SELECT CHAR(13) + @SQL_OFF                   SELECT INSERTS         FROM @RESULT            SET NOCOUNT OFF            END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_helpdiagramdefinition   (    @diagramname  sysname,    @owner_id int = null      )   WITH EXECUTE AS N'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    set nocount on      declare @theId   int    declare @IsDbo   int    declare @DiagId  int    declare @UIDFound int       if(@diagramname is null)    begin     RAISERROR (N'E_INVALIDARG', 16, 1);     return -1    end       execute as caller;    select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();    select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');    if(@owner_id is null)     select @owner_id = @theId;    revert;        select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname;    if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @UIDFound <> @theId ))    begin     RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1);     return -3    end      select version, definition FROM dbo.sysdiagrams where diagram_id = @DiagId ;     return 0   END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_helpdiagrams   (    @diagramname sysname = NULL,    @owner_id int = NULL   )   WITH EXECUTE AS N'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    DECLARE @user sysname    DECLARE @dboLogin bit    EXECUTE AS CALLER;     SET @user = USER_NAME();     SET @dboLogin = CONVERT(bit,IS_MEMBER('db_owner'));    REVERT;    SELECT     [Database] = DB_NAME(),     [Name] = name,     [ID] = diagram_id,     [Owner] = USER_NAME(principal_id),     [OwnerID] = principal_id    FROM     sysdiagrams    WHERE     (@dboLogin = 1 OR USER_NAME(principal_id) = @user) AND     (@diagramname IS NULL OR name = @diagramname) AND     (@owner_id IS NULL OR principal_id = @owner_id)    ORDER BY     4, 5, 1   END

ISNULL( FI.VL_IR, 0 ) )           WHEN '1' THEN ( ISNULL( FI.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FI.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FI.VL_IR, 0 ) ) * (-1)         END ), 2 ), 0 )   FROM   TFATURAMENTO_CC FI, TITEM I (NOLOCK)  WHERE  FI.CD_ITEM = I.CD_ITEM AND         I.IN_TRIBUTAVEL = '1' AND         FI.IN_CANCELADO = '0' AND        SUBSTRING(FI.NR_PROCESSO,1,2) = '01' AND        SUBSTRING(FI.NR_PROCESSO,3,2) = '01' AND         --FI.NR_SOLIC_FAT = @nr_solicitacao AND         FI.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo  and         ISNULL( FI.CD_ITEM_NAO_FAT, '' ) <> '*' AND         FI.CD_ITEM NOT IN (991,992,993,995,996,998,997,988,987,128,994,578,822,990,989)    --select CD_ITEM_RECEB_NUM, CD_ITEM_DEVOL_NUM, CD_ITEM_EXTOR_NUM, CD_ITEM_SALDO_CRE,     --   CD_ITEM_SALDO_DEB, CD_ITEM_RECEB_SD,  CD_ITEM_PAGTO_SD,  CD_ITEM_EXT_RECEB,      --   CD_ITEM_EXT_PAGTO, CD_ITEM_NAO_FAT  , CD_ITEM_IR       , CD_ITEM_COFINS_RETENCAO,     --   CD_ITEM_COMISSAO , CD_ITEM_PAGO_CLI , CD_ITEM_PIS_COFINS  --from TPARAMETROS    EXEC @erro= sp_calc_comissao @nr_processo,@vl_comissao output     If @erro>0 return (@erro)    /*-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------    SELECT @vl_comissao =  ISNULL( ROUND( SUM(         CASE IN_RESTITUI            WHEN '0' THEN ( ISNULL( FI.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FI.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FI.VL_IR, 0 ) )           WHEN '1' THEN ( ISNULL( FI.VL_ITEM, 0 ) + ISNULL( FI.VL_ASSIST, 0 ) - ISNULL( FI.VL_IR, 0 ) ) * (-1)         END ), 2 ), 0 )  FROM   TFATURAMENTO_CC FI (NOLOCK), TITEM I (NOLOCK)  WHERE  FI.CD_ITEM = I.CD_ITEM AND         FI.IN_CANCELADO = '0' AND   SUBSTRING(FI.NR_PROCESSO,1,2) = '01' AND   SUBSTRING(FI.NR_PROCESSO,3,2) = '01' AND         FI.NR_PROCESSO =  @nr_processo  and  --       FI.NR_SOLIC_FAT = @nr_solicitacao AND         FI.CD_ITEM = ( 822)    --select CD_ITEM_COMISSAO from TPARAMETROS    ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

CREATE PROCEDURE   [dbo].[sp_Importacao_Custeio2] (    @nr_processo char(14),  @vl_tot_nao_tributavel   float  output,  @vl_sub_tot_tributavel float  output,  @vl_comissao float  output , float,  @vl_ipi float,  @vl_pis float,  @vl_total_adicao float,  @vl_total_icms float,  @vl_total_ipi float,  @vl_total_pis float,  @vl_total_cofins float,  @vl_total_sem_multa_icms float,  @vl_total_sem_multa_ipi float,  @vl_total_sem_multa_pis float,  @vl_total_sem_multa_cofins float,  @vl_multa_icms float,  @vl_multa_ipi float,  @vl_multa_pis float,  @vl_multa_cofins float,  @vl_recuperado_aux float      SET @vl_tot_nao_tributavel = 0  SET @vl_sub_tot_tributavel = 0  SET @vl_comissao = 0  SET @vl_tot_geral = 0  SET @vl_recuperado = 0    --SELECT * FROM TESTAGIO_PROCESSO WHERE NR_PROCESSO_DES = '0101IM-0824-09'  --SELECT * FROM TESTAGIO_PROCESSO WHERE NR_PROCESSO_DES = '0101IA-0244-09'      --valor faturamento (com multa)  SELECT TOP 1 @vl_total_icms = VL_ITEM    FROM TFATURAMENTO_CC    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo   AND CD_ITEM = '027'    SELECT TOP 1 @vl_total_ipi = VL_ITEM    FROM TFATURAMENTO_CC    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo   AND CD_ITEM = '026'    SELECT TOP 1 @vl_total_pis = VL_ITEM    FROM TFATURAMENTO_CC    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo   AND CD_ITEM = '600'    SELECT TOP 1 @vl_total_cofins = VL_ITEM    FROM TFATURAMENTO_CC    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo   AND CD_ITEM = '599'    --valor di  SELECT  @vl_total_sem_multa_icms = VL_TOT_ICMS    FROM TDECLARACAO_IMPORTACAO    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo    SELECT NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo    SELECT  @vl_total_sem_multa_cofins = SUM(VL_COFINS)     FROM TADICAO_DE_IMPORTACAO     WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo    SET @vl_total_icms = ISNULL(@vl_total_icms, AI.NR_ADICAO)      LEFT JOIN TRIBUTO TR ON (TR.NR_PROCESSO = AI.NR_PROCESSO AND TR.NR_ADICAO = AI.NR_ADICAO AND TR.CD_RECEITA_IMPOSTO = '0002')     INNER JOIN TESTAGIO_PROCESSO EP ON (EP.NR_PROCESSO_DES = DI.NR_PROCESSO AND EP.NR_REFERENCIA = DM.NR_PROC_PO AND EP.NR_ITEM_CLIENTE = DM.NR_ITEM_PO AND EP.NR_PARCIAL = DM.NR_PARCIAL AND ISNULL(EP.CD_EMPRESA,'') = ISNULL(DM.CD_EMPRESA,''))    INNER JOIN TPROCESSO SG ON (SG.NR_PROCESSO = EP.NR_PROCESSO_ADM)  WHERE DI.NR_PROCESSO = @nr_processo  ORDER BY AI.NR_ADICAO    OPEN CUR_IMPOSTOS  FETCH CUR_IMPOSTOS INTO @nr_processo_di , @cd_cobertura, @nr_adicao, @vl_icms, @vl_ipi, @vl_pis, @vl_cofins, @vl_total_adicao, @cd_tp_pedido      WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS <> -1  BEGIN

/*Altera a ordem dos campos de um menu e submenu especifico*/    CREATE PROCEDURE sp_ordena_eventos_campo (   @cd_menu    char(3),   @cd_subm    char(3),   @nr_origem  int,   @nr_destino int  ) AS    /*  SET XACT_ABORT ON    BEGIN TRAN    DECLARE   @cd_menu    char(3),   @cd_subm    char(3),   @nr_origem  int,   @nr_destino int    SELECT   @cd_menu    = '001',   @cd_subm    = '001',   @nr_origem  = 3,   @nr_destino = 8  --*/    if @nr_origem < @nr_destino -- origem menor que o destino  begin  select 'menor'    UPDATE M04_CAMPO     SET M04_NR_ORDEM = M04_NR_ORDEM - 1    WHERE M04_CD_MENU = @cd_menu   AND M04_CD_SUBM = @cd_subm   AND M04_NR_ORDEM <= @nr_destino   AND M04_NR_ORDEM >  @nr_origem  end    if @nr_origem > @nr_destino --origem maior que o destino  begin  select 'maior'    UPDATE M04_CAMPO     SET M04_NR_ORDEM = M04_NR_ORDEM + 1    WHERE M04_CD_MENU = @cd_menu   AND M04_CD_SUBM = @cd_subm   AND M04_NR_ORDEM >= @nr_destino   AND M04_NR_ORDEM <  @nr_origem  end    /*  ROLLBACK TRAN    SET XACT_ABORT OFF  --*/

/*Altera a ordem dos campos de um menu e submenu especifico*/    CREATE PROCEDURE sp_ordena_eventos_filtro (   @cd_menu    char(3),   @cd_subm    char(3),   @nr_origem  int,   @nr_destino int  ) AS    /*  SET XACT_ABORT ON    BEGIN TRAN    DECLARE   @cd_menu    char(3),   @cd_subm    char(3),   @nr_origem  int,   @nr_destino int    SELECT   @cd_menu    = '001',   @cd_subm    = '001',   @nr_origem  = 3,   @nr_destino = 8  --*/    if @nr_origem < @nr_destino -- origem menor que o destino  begin  select 'menor'    UPDATE M05_FILTRO     SET M05_NR_ORDEM = M05_NR_ORDEM - 1    WHERE M05_CD_MENU = @cd_menu   AND M05_CD_SUBM = @cd_subm   AND M05_NR_ORDEM <= @nr_destino   AND M05_NR_ORDEM >  @nr_origem  end    if @nr_origem > @nr_destino --origem maior que o destino  begin  select 'maior'    UPDATE M05_FILTRO     SET M05_NR_ORDEM = M05_NR_ORDEM + 1    WHERE M05_CD_MENU = @cd_menu   AND M05_CD_SUBM = @cd_subm   AND M05_NR_ORDEM >= @nr_destino   AND M05_NR_ORDEM <  @nr_origem  end    /*  ROLLBACK TRAN    SET XACT_ABORT OFF  --*/

CREATE PROC [dbo].[sp_rap_calc_peso_liq] (@nrEmbarque char(6)) AS  /*  BEGIN TRAN  DECLARE @nrEmbarque char(6)  SET @nrEmbarque = '063007'  --*/  SET NOCOUNT ON  DECLARE    @cdMerc char(20),    @vlPesoLiq decimal(16,7)    DECLARE cPesoLiq CURSOR LOCAL FOR    SELECT P.CD_MERCADORIA, SUM(P.VL_PESO_LIQ)/SUM(P.VL_QTDE) AS VL_PESO_LIQ_UN    FROM TRAP_EMBARQUE E (NOLOCK), TRAP_PACK_LIST P (NOLOCK)    WHERE E.CD_EMBARQUE+E.CD_EMBARQUE_ANO = @nrEmbarque      AND E.CD_RAP+E.CD_RAP_ANO = P.CD_RAP+P.CD_RAP_ANO      AND E.CD_GRUPO = P.CD_GRUPO    GROUP BY P.CD_MERCADORIA    OPEN cPesoLiq  FETCH cPesoLiq INTO @cdMerc, @vlPesoLiq    WHILE @@fetch_status = 0 BEGIN    UPDATE F SET      VL_PESO_LIQ_UN    = @vlPesoLiq,      VL_PESO_LIQ_TOTAL = VL_QTDE * @vlPesoLiq    FROM TRAP_EMBARQUE E (NOLOCK), TRAP_FORNECIMENTO F (NOLOCK)    WHERE E.CD_EMBARQUE+E.CD_EMBARQUE_ANO = @nrEmbarque      AND E.CD_RAP+E.CD_RAP_ANO = F.CD_RAP+F.CD_RAP_ANO      AND E.CD_GRUPO = F.CD_GRUPO      AND F.CD_MERCADORIA = @cdMerc      FETCH cPesoLiq INTO @cdMerc, @vlPesoLiq  END    CLOSE cPesoLiq  DEALLOCATE cPesoLiq  SET NOCOUNT OFF  /*  select f.* from trap_embarque e (nolock), trap_fornecimento f (nolock)  where e.cd_embarque+e.cd_embarque_ano = @nrEmbarque and e.cd_rap+e.cd_rap_ano = f.cd_rap+f.cd_rap_ano  ROLLBACK TRAN  --COMMIT TRAN  --*/

CREATE PROC [dbo].[sp_rap_monta_palet] (@nrProcesso char(18), @cdEmbarque char(10)) AS    /*    BEGIN TRAN    DECLARE @nrProcesso char(18) = '0102EM-002929-15'    DECLARE @cdEmbarque char(10) = '105715'        DELETE BROKER.DBO.TPROCESSO_PALETIZACAO WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nrProcesso        --*/    SET NOCOUNT ON    DECLARE      @nrRap       char(6),      @nrRapAno    char(2),      @cdMerc      char(20),      @cdCaminho   integer,      @vlQtde      decimal(16,7),      @vlQtdeTotal decimal(16,7),      @cdItem      char(3),      @vlQtdeItem  decimal(16,7),      @cdVolume    varchar(15),      @vlQtdePack  decimal(16,7),      @vlPesoBruto decimal(16,7),      @vlPesoLiquido decimal(16,7),      @vlCubagem   decimal(16,7),      @NrGrupo     char(3)          SELECT @NrGrupo = CD_GRUPO     FROM BROKER.DBO.TPROCESSO    WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nrProcesso          DECLARE @TB_ITEM AS TABLE(CD_ITEM CHAR(3), CD_MERCADORIA VARCHAR(20), VL_QTDE DECIMAL(28,5))    DECLARE @TB_PACK AS TABLE(CD_VOLUME CHAR(15), CD_MERCADORIA VARCHAR(20), VL_QTDE DECIMAL(28,5))        --inicia o contador de caminho    SET @cdCaminho = 1    --limpa a paletização        DELETE BROKER.DBO.TPROCESSO_PALETIZACAO WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nrProcesso    UPDATE BROKER.DBO.TPROCESSO_EXP_ITEM SET QT_BAIXADA = 0 WHERE NR_PROCESSO = @nrProcesso    --seleciona as mercadorias que foram incluidas nos itens        DECLARE cMerc CURSOR LOCAL FOR      SELECT DISTINCT F.CD_RAP, F.CD_RAP_ANO, F.CD_MERCADORIA      FROM TRAP_EMBARQUE E (NOLOCK), TRAP_FORNECIMENTO F (NOLOCK)      WHERE E.CD_EMBARQUE = LEFT(@cdEmbarque, 8)        AND E.CD_EMBARQUE_ANO = RIGHT(@cdEmbarque, 2)        AND F.CD_RAP = E.CD_RAP        AND F.CD_RAP_ANO = E.CD_RAP_ANO        AND F.CD_GRUPO = E.CD_GRUPO        OPEN cMerc    FETCH cMerc INTO @nrRap, @nrRapAno, @cdMerc        WHILE @@fetch_status = 0     BEGIN      PRINT @nrRap + '/' + @nrRapAno      --seleciona os itens do fornecimento      INSERT INTO @TB_ITEM      SELECT CD_ITEM, CD_MERCADORIA, VL_QTDE      --INTO #TMP_ITEM      FROM TRAP_FORNECIMENTO (NOLOCK)      WHERE CD_RAP = @nrRap        AND CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRapAno        AND CD_GRUPO = @NrGrupo        AND CD_MERCADORIA = @cdMerc      ORDER BY 1      --seleciona os volumes do palet      INSERT INTO @TB_PACK      SELECT CD_VOLUME, CD_MERCADORIA, VL_QTDE      --INTO #TMP_PACK      FROM TRAP_PACK_LIST (NOLOCK)      WHERE CD_RAP = @nrRap        AND CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRapAno        AND CD_GRUPO = @NrGrupo        AND CD_MERCADORIA = @cdMerc      ORDER BY 1          WHILE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM @TB_ITEM) > 0      BEGIN        --seleciona o codigo do item, volume e qtdes das merc.        SELECT TOP 1 @cdItem = RTRIM(CD_ITEM), @vlQtdeItem = ISNULL(VL_QTDE, 0) FROM @TB_ITEM        SELECT TOP 1 @cdVolume = RTRIM(CD_VOLUME), @vlQtdePack = ISNULL(VL_QTDE, 0) FROM @TB_PACK            PRINT 'ITEM: ' + @CDITEM        PRINT 'VOLUME: ' + @CDVOLUME        PRINT '@vlQtdeItem: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @vlQtdeItem)        PRINT '@@vlQtdePack: ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, @vlQtdePack)            IF @vlQtdeItem > @vlQtdePack        BEGIN          --se a qtde da merc. for maior que a qtde da merc. nos volumes, subtrai a qtde do volume do item,          --apaga o volume da tabela temporaria e a seleciona a qtde do volume para inserir na paletização          UPDATE @TB_ITEM SET VL_QTDE = @vlQtdeItem - @vlQtdePack WHERE CD_ITEM = @cdItem          DELETE @TB_PACK WHERE CD_VOLUME = @cdVolume          SET @vlQtde = @vlQtdePack         END        IF @vlQtdeItem <= @vlQtdePack        BEGIN          --se a qtde da merc. for menor ou igual a qtde da merc. nos volumes, subtrai a qtde do item do volume,          --apaga o item da tabela temporaria e a seleciona a qtde do item para inserir na paletização          DELETE @TB_ITEM WHERE CD_ITEM = @cdItem          UPDATE @TB_PACK SET VL_QTDE = @vlQtdePack - @vlQtdeItem WHERE CD_VOLUME = @cdVolume          SET @vlQtde = @vlQtdeItem        END            IF @vlQtde > 0        BEGIN          --atualiza a qtde baixada nos itens

CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_rap_num_itens_cons]( @embarque VARCHAR(6), @grupo VARCHAR(3)) AS   SET NOCOUNT ON  DECLARE @TB_CURSOR AS TABLE (RAP VARCHAR(8), FORNECIMENTO VARCHAR(10), MERCADORIA VARCHAR(40), ITEM VARCHAR(3), GRUPO VARCHAR(3) )       DECLARE @RAP VARCHAR(8)  DECLARE @FORNECIMENTO VARCHAR(10)   DECLARE @MERCADORIA VARCHAR(40)  DECLARE @ITEM VARCHAR(3)  DECLARE @COUNT INT    INSERT @TB_CURSOR  SELECT E.CD_RAP+E.CD_RAP_ANO, F.CD_FORNECIMENTO, F.CD_MERCADORIA, F.CD_ITEM, '028' AS CD_GRUPO  FROM TRAP_EMBARQUE E (NOLOCK), TRAP_FORNECIMENTO F (NOLOCK)   WHERE E.CD_EMBARQUE+E.CD_EMBARQUE_ANO = @embarque  AND E.CD_RAP+E.CD_RAP_ANO+E.CD_GRUPO = F.CD_RAP+F.CD_RAP_ANO+F.CD_GRUPO   --GROUP BY E.CD_RAP+E.CD_RAP_ANO, F.CD_FORNECIMENTO    ORDER BY E.CD_RAP+E.CD_RAP_ANO, F.CD_FORNECIMENTO, F.CD_MERCADORIA, F.CD_ITEM, CD_GRUPO    SET @COUNT = 1    WHILE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM @TB_CURSOR) > 0    BEGIN   SELECT TOP 1 @RAP = RAP, @FORNECIMENTO = FORNECIMENTO, @MERCADORIA = MERCADORIA, @ITEM = ITEM, @GRUPO = GRUPO FROM @TB_CURSOR     DELETE FROM @TB_CURSOR    WHERE RAP = @RAP      AND FORNECIMENTO = @FORNECIMENTO      AND MERCADORIA = @MERCADORIA     AND ITEM = @ITEM      AND GRUPO = @GRUPO      IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAP_FORNECIMENTO (NOLOCK)       WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @RAP         AND CD_FORNECIMENTO = @FORNECIMENTO          AND CD_MERCADORIA = @MERCADORIA          AND CD_ITEM = @ITEM         AND CD_GRUPO = @GRUPO) = 0   BEGIN      UPDATE TRAP_FORNECIMENTO      SET CD_ITEM = RIGHT('000'+ CAST(@COUNT AS VARCHAR(3)), 3)      WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @RAP        AND CD_FORNECIMENTO = @FORNECIMENTO        AND CD_MERCADORIA = @MERCADORIA        AND CD_ITEM = @ITEM       AND CD_GRUPO = @GRUPO   END     ELSE   BEGIN     SET @COUNT = @COUNT + 1      UPDATE TRAP_FORNECIMENTO      SET CD_ITEM = RIGHT('000'+ CAST(@COUNT AS VARCHAR(3)), 3)      WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @RAP        AND CD_FORNECIMENTO = @FORNECIMENTO        AND CD_MERCADORIA = @MERCADORIA        AND CD_ITEM = @ITEM       AND CD_GRUPO = @GRUPO   END      SET @COUNT = @COUNT + 1   END    SET NOCOUNT OFF

/*Renumera os itens do fornecimento da rap*/  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_rap_renum_itens]( @nrRap char(8),@nrGrupo char(3), @nrUltimo int output ) AS   /*  BEGIN TRAN  DECLARE    @nrRap char(8),    @nrUltimo int  SET @nrRap = '00009007'  --*/  SET NOCOUNT ON  DECLARE    @nrItem char(3)    SET @nrUltimo = 1    IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAP_FORNECIMENTO (NOLOCK)  WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap AND CD_GRUPO = @NrGrupo) > 0    BEGIN    DECLARE cFornec CURSOR LOCAL FOR      SELECT CD_ITEM FROM TRAP_FORNECIMENTO      WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap AND CD_GRUPO = @NrGrupo ORDER BY CD_ITEM        OPEN cFornec    FETCH cFornec INTO @nrItem        WHILE @@fetch_status = 0    BEGIN      UPDATE TRAP_FORNECIMENTO SET         CD_ITEM = RIGHT('000'+CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM(@nrUltimo)) as varchar(3)), 3)      WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap AND CD_ITEM = @nrItem AND CD_GRUPO = @NrGrupo              SET @nrUltimo = @nrUltimo + 1            FETCH cFornec INTO @nrItem    END        CLOSE cFornec    DEALLOCATE cFornec  END  /*  select @nrUltimo  select * from trap_fornecimento where cd_rap+cd_rap_ano = @nrRap order by cd_item  ROLLBACK TRAN  --*/  SET NOCOUNT OFF

CREATE PROC [dbo].[sp_rap_verifica_fornec]( @nrRap char(8), @nrGrupo char(3) ) AS    /*Verificação de Fornecimentos    - valor fob somado = digitado na rap    - moeda fob = digitado na rap    - incoterm = digitado na rap    - condição de pagto = digitado na rap*/    /*    BEGIN TRAN    DECLARE @nrRap char(8)    SET @nrRap = '00132107'    --*/    SET NOCOUNT ON    DECLARE      @nrFornecimento varchar(2048),      @vlFobRap       decimal(16,7),      @vlFobCebrace       decimal(16,7),      @vlAcrescimo    decimal(16,7),    @vlFrete        decimal(16,7),    @vlSeguro       decimal(16,7),    @vlDesconto     decimal(16,7),    @cdMoedaRap     char(3),      @cdIncotermRap  char(3),      @cdCondPagtoRap char(6)        DECLARE      @cdFornec    char(10),      @cdItem      char(3),      @cdMerc      varchar(20),      @vlFob       decimal(16,7),      @cdMoeda     char(3),      @cdIncoterm  char(3),      @cdCondPagto char(6)        DECLARE      @nrErrM int, @txErrM nvarchar(512),      @nrErrI int, @txErrI nvarchar(512),      @nrErrC int, @txErrC nvarchar(512),      @txErrF nvarchar(2048),      @txErro nvarchar(2048),      @nrRETURN int,     @NmMoedaRap nvarchar(255),        @NmMoeda nvarchar(255)          SET @nrErrM = 0    SET @nrErrI = 0    SET @nrErrC = 0    SET @txErrM = ''    SET @txErrI = ''    SET @txErrC = ''    SET @txErrF = ''    SET @txErro = ''        -- verifica se todas os fornecimentos tem a mesma informação da rap    SELECT       @nrFornecimento = NR_FORNECIMENTO,      @vlFobRap       = ROUND(ISNULL(VL_MLE, 0), 2),      @vlAcrescimo    = ROUND(ISNULL(VL_ACRESCIMO, 0), 2),     @vlDesconto     = ROUND(ISNULL(VL_DESCONTO, 0), 2),     @vlFrete        = ROUND(ISNULL(VL_FRETE_INT, 0), 2),     @vlSeguro       = ROUND(ISNULL(VL_SEGURO, 0), 2),     @cdMoedaRap     = CD_MOEDA_MLE,      @cdIncotermRap  = CD_INCOTERM,      @cdCondPagtoRap = CD_TERMO_PAGTO    FROM TRAP (NOLOCK)    WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap      AND CD_GRUPO        = @nrGrupo        --limpa todos os erros encontrados nos fornecimento    UPDATE TRAP_FORNECIMENTO SET      TP_ERRO_VALIDA = NULL     WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap      AND CD_GRUPO            = @nrGrupo          SELECT CD_FORNECIMENTO, CD_ITEM, CD_MERCADORIA, CD_INCOTERM,        (SELECT CD_DDBROKER FROM TDE_PARA (NOLOCK) WHERE CD_EXTERNO = TX_MOEDA AND CD_TABELA = '21') MOEDA,        (SELECT CD_DDBROKER FROM TDE_PARA (NOLOCK) WHERE CD_EXTERNO = CD_MOD_PAGTO AND CD_TABELA = '22') MOD_PAGTO      INTO #TMP_RAP_FORNECIMENTO    FROM TRAP_FORNECIMENTO RF           WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap         AND CD_GRUPO          = @nrGrupo      GROUP BY CD_FORNECIMENTO, CD_ITEM, CD_MERCADORIA, CD_INCOTERM, TX_MOEDA, CD_MOD_PAGTO     WHILE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM #TMP_RAP_FORNECIMENTO ) > 0    BEGIN        SELECT TOP 1 @cdFornec = CD_FORNECIMENTO, @cdItem = CD_ITEM, @cdMerc = CD_MERCADORIA, @cdMoeda = MOEDA,            @cdIncoterm = CD_INCOTERM, @cdCondPagto = MOD_PAGTO      FROM #TMP_RAP_FORNECIMENTO      --Verificação da Moeda FOB      IF @cdMoeda <> @cdMoedaRap      BEGIN        SET @nrErrM = @nrErrM + 1        IF CHARINDEX(@cdFornec, @txErrM) = 0 SET @txErrM = @txErrM+@cdFornec+', '            UPDATE TRAP_FORNECIMENTO SET          TP_ERRO_VALIDA = ISNULL(TP_ERRO_VALIDA, '')+'0,'           WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO   = @nrRap         AND CD_GRUPO            = @nrGrupo             AND CD_ITEM             = @cdItem          AND CD_MERCADORIA       = @cdMerc      END      --Verificação da Condição de Pagto      IF @cdCondPagto <> @cdCondPagtoRap      BEGIN        SET @nrErrC = @nrErrC + 1        IF CHARINDEX(@cdFornec, @txErrC) = 0 SET @txErrC = @txErrC+@cdFornec+', '            UPDATE TRAP_FORNECIMENTO SET          TP_ERRO_VALIDA = ISNULL(TP_ERRO_VALIDA, '')+'2,'           WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO     = @nrRap         AND CD_GRUPO              = @nrGrupo             AND CD_ITEM               = @cdItem          AND CD_MERCADORIA         = @cdMerc      END          DELETE FROM #TMP_RAP_FORNECIMENTO WHERE CD_FORNECIM

CREATE  PROC [dbo].[sp_rap_verifica_pack]( @nrRap char(8), @nrGrupo char(3) ) AS  /*  BEGIN TRAN  DECLARE @nrRap char(8)  DECLARE @nrGrupo char(3)  SET @nrRap = '00105614'  SET @nrGrupo = '028'  --*/  SET NOCOUNT ON  DECLARE    @vlPesoLiqRap decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoLiqTotal decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoBrutoRap decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoBrutoTotal decimal(16,7),    @vlCubagemRap decimal(16,7),    @vlCubagemTotal decimal(28,7),    @vlQtdVolRap integer,    @vlQtdVolTotal integer,    @cdMercForn char(20),    @vlQtdeForn decimal(16,7),    @cdMercPack char(20),    @vlQtdePack decimal(16,7),    @cdVolume char(15),    @vlPesoLiqTotMerc decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoLiqTotVol decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoBrutoTotVol decimal(16, 7),    @inAmostra bit    DECLARE    @nrErrL int, @txErrL nvarchar(512),    @nrErrB int, @txErrB nvarchar(512),    @nrErrM int, @txErrM nvarchar(512),    @nrErrQ int, @txErrQ nvarchar(512),    @txErro nvarchar(2048),    @nrReturn int    SET @nrErrL = 0  SET @nrErrB = 0  SET @nrErrM = 0  SET @nrErrQ = 0  SET @txErrL = ''  SET @txErrB = ''  SET @txErrM = ''  SET @txErrQ = ''  SET @txErro = ''  --verifica se é um processo de amostra  SELECT @inAmostra = IN_AMOSTRA FROM TRAP (NOLOCK) WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap  --verifica se existem mercadorias informadas no fornecimento e não encontradas nos volumes  IF (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TRAP_FORNECIMENTO F (NOLOCK)      WHERE F.CD_RAP+F.CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap AND @inAmostra = 0        AND F.CD_GRUPO = @nrGrupo        AND F.CD_MERCADORIA NOT IN (SELECT CD_MERCADORIA FROM TRAP_PACK_LIST (NOLOCK) WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap AND CD_GRUPO = @nrGrupo)) > 0 BEGIN    SET @txErro = 'Algumas mercadorias informadas no(s) fornecimento(s) não foram encontradas no(s) volume(s) do packing list.'+CHAR(13)+CHAR(10)+'Verifique as mercadorias listadas abaixo.'      UPDATE TRAP SET      IN_PACK_VALIDA = 0, TX_VALIDACAO = @txErro    WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap        AND CD_GRUPO          = @nrGrupo     SET @nrReturn  = 0  END  ELSE BEGIN    --limpa todos os erros encontrados nos fornecimento    UPDATE TRAP_PACK_LIST SET TP_ERRO_VALIDA = NULL WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap AND CD_GRUPO = @nrGrupo        IF @inAmostra = 0 BEGIN      /***** VERIFICAÇÃO DE MERCADORIAS *****/      DECLARE cPack CURSOR LOCAL FOR        SELECT CD_MERCADORIA, SUM(VL_QTDE)        FROM TRAP_PACK_LIST (NOLOCK)        WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap          AND CD_GRUPO              = @nrGrupo        GROUP BY CD_MERCADORIA            OPEN cPack      FETCH cPack INTO @cdMercPack, @vlQtdePack            WHILE @@fetch_status = 0      BEGIN        SELECT @vlQtdeForn = ISNULL(SUM(VL_QTDE), 0)        FROM TRAP_FORNECIMENTO (NOLOCK)            WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap           AND CD_GRUPO            = @nrGrupo          AND CD_MERCADORIA         = @cdMercPack                IF @vlQtdeForn > 0        BEGIN          IF ROUND(@vlQtdePack, 2) < ROUND(@vlQtdeForn, 2)          BEGIN            SET @nrErrQ = @nrErrQ + 1            UPDATE TRAP_PACK_LIST SET              TP_ERRO_VALIDA = ISNULL(TP_ERRO_VALIDA, '')+'1,'            WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap              AND CD_GRUPO              = @nrGrupo              AND CD_MERCADORIA           = @cdMercPack          END          IF ROUND(@vlQtdePack, 2) > ROUND(@vlQtdeForn, 2)          BEGIN            SET @nrErrQ = @nrErrQ + 1            UPDATE TRAP_PACK_LIST SET              TP_ERRO_VALIDA = ISNULL(TP_ERRO_VALIDA, '')+'2,'            WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap              AND CD_GRUPO              = @nrGrupo              AND CD_MERCADORIA           = @cdMercPack          END        END        ELSE        BEGIN          SET @nrErrM = @nrErrM + 1          UPDATE TRAP_PACK_LIST SET            TP_ERRO_VALIDA = ISNULL(TP_ERRO_VALIDA, '')+'0,'          WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap              AND CD_GRUPO              = @nrGrupo              AND CD_MERCADORIA           = @cdMercPack        END              FETCH cPack INTO @cdMercPack, @vlQtdePack      END

CREATE PROC [dbo].[sp_rap_verifica_pedido]( @nrRap char(8), @nrGrupo char(3) ) AS  /*Verificação de Pedidos  - valor fob somado = digitado na rap  - moeda fob = digitado na rap  - incoterm = digitado na rap  - condição de pagto = digitado na rap*/  /*  BEGIN TRAN  DECLARE @nrRap char(8)  SET @nrRap = '00088307'  --*/  SET NOCOUNT ON  DECLARE    @vlFobRap       decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoLiqRap   decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoBrutoRap decimal(16,7),    @cdMoedaRap     char(3),    @cdIncotermRap  char(3),    @cdCondPagtoRap char(6)    DECLARE    @cdPedido    char(10),    @cdItem      char(6),    @cdMerc      varchar(20),    @vlFob       decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoLiq   decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoBruto decimal(16,7),    @cdMoeda     char(3),    @cdIncoterm  char(3),    @cdCondPagto char(6)    DECLARE    @nrErrM int, @txErrM nvarchar(512),    @nrErrI int, @txErrI nvarchar(512),    @nrErrC int, @txErrC nvarchar(512),    @txErro nvarchar(2048),    @nrReturn int    SET @nrErrM = 0  SET @nrErrI = 0  SET @nrErrC = 0  SET @txErrM = ''  SET @txErrI = ''  SET @txErrC = ''  SET @txErro = ''    -- verifica se todas os pedidos tem a mesma informação da rap  SELECT     @vlFobRap = ROUND(ISNULL(VL_MLE, 0), 2),    @vlPesoLiqRap = ROUND(ISNULL(VL_PESO_LIQ, 0), 2),    @vlPesoBrutoRap = ROUND(ISNULL(VL_PESO_BRUTO, 0), 2),    @cdMoedaRap = CD_MOEDA_MLE,    @cdIncotermRap = CD_INCOTERM,    @cdCondPagtoRap = CD_TERMO_PAGTO  FROM TRAP (NOLOCK)    WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap      AND CD_GRUPO        = @nrGrupo    --limpa todos os erros encontrados nos pedidos  UPDATE TPE_ITEM SET TP_ERRO_VALIDA = NULL  WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP))+RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP_ANO)) = @nrRap   AND CD_GRUPO = @nrGrupo    DECLARE cPedido CURSOR LOCAL FOR    SELECT NR_PEDIDO, NR_ITEM, CD_PRODUTO, CD_INCOTERM,      ISNULL((SELECT CD_DDBROKER FROM TDE_PARA (NOLOCK) WHERE CD_EXTERNO = CD_MOEDA AND CD_TABELA = '21'), ''),      ISNULL((SELECT CD_DDBROKER FROM TDE_PARA (NOLOCK) WHERE CD_EXTERNO = CD_TERMO_PAGTO AND CD_TABELA = '22'), '')    FROM TPE_ITEM (NOLOCK)    WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP))+RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP_ANO)) = @nrRap      AND CD_GRUPO = @nrGrupo      AND ISNULL(QT_BAIXADA, 0) > 0    GROUP BY NR_PEDIDO, NR_ITEM, CD_PRODUTO, CD_INCOTERM, CD_MOEDA, CD_TERMO_PAGTO    OPEN cPedido  FETCH cPedido INTO @cdPedido, @cdItem, @cdMerc, @cdIncoterm, @cdMoeda, @cdCondPagto    WHILE @@fetch_status = 0  BEGIN    --Verificação da Moeda FOB    IF @cdMoeda <> @cdMoedaRap    BEGIN      SET @nrErrM = @nrErrM + 1      IF CHARINDEX(@cdPedido, @txErrM) = 0 SET @txErrM = @txErrM+@cdPedido+', '        UPDATE TPE_ITEM SET        TP_ERRO_VALIDA = ISNULL(TP_ERRO_VALIDA, '')+'0,'      WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP))+RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP_ANO)) = @nrRap        AND CD_GRUPO = @nrGrupo        AND NR_PEDIDO  = @cdPedido        AND NR_ITEM    = @cdItem        AND CD_PRODUTO = @cdMerc    END    --Verificação do Incoterm  /*  IF @cdIncoterm <> @cdIncotermRap    BEGIN      SET @nrErrI = @nrErrI + 1      IF CHARINDEX(@cdPedido, @txErrI) = 0 SET @txErrI = @txErrI+@cdPedido+', '        UPDATE TPE_ITEM SET        TP_ERRO_VALIDA = ISNULL(TP_ERRO_VALIDA, '')+'1,'      WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP))+RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP_ANO)) = @nrRap        AND NR_PEDIDO  = @cdPedido        AND NR_ITEM    = @cdItem        AND CD_PRODUTO = @cdMerc    END  --Não será mais feita essa verificação a pedido da saint-gobain. 26/03/2007 (já deixei preparado caso mude) */    --Verificação da Condição de Pagto    IF @cdCondPagto <> @cdCondPagtoRap    BEGIN      SET @nrErrC = @nrErrC + 1      IF CHARINDEX(@cdPedido, @txErrC) = 0 SET @txErrC = @txErrC+@cdPedido+', '        UPDATE TPE_ITEM SET        TP_ERRO_VALIDA = ISNULL(TP_ERRO_VALIDA, '')+'2,'      WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP))+RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP_ANO)) = @nrRap        AND CD_GRUPO = @nrGrupo        AND NR_PEDIDO  = @cdPedido        AND NR_ITEM    = @cdItem        AND CD_PRODUTO = @cdMerc    END      FETCH cPedido INTO @cdPedido, @cdItem, @cdMerc, @cdIncoterm, @cdMoeda, @cdCondPagto  END    CLOSE cPedido  DEALLOCATE cPedid

CREATE PROC [dbo].[sp_rap_verifica_reemissao] (@nrRap char(8), @nrGrupo char(3)) AS  /*  BEGIN TRAN  DECLARE @nrRap char(8)  SET @nrRap = '00088307'  --*/  SET NOCOUNT ON  DECLARE    @cdPedido char(10),    @cdItem char(6),    @cdMercadoria char(20),    @vlQtdeRemessa decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoLiqRemessa decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoBtoRemessa decimal(16,7),    @vlQtdePedido decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoLiqPedido decimal(16,7),    @vlPesoBtoPedido decimal(16,7),    @inReemissao char(1)    SET @inReemissao = '0'    DECLARE cRemessa CURSOR LOCAL FOR    SELECT CD_REFERENCIA, NR_ITEM_CLIENTE, CD_MERCADORIA, ROUND(VL_QTDE, 2), ROUND(VL_PESO_LIQ_TOTAL, 2), ROUND(VL_PESO_BRUTO_TOTAL, 2)     FROM TRAP_FORNECIMENTO   WHERE CD_RAP+CD_RAP_ANO = @nrRap      AND CD_GRUPO            = @nrGrupo       OPEN cRemessa  FETCH cRemessa INTO @cdPedido, @cdItem, @cdMercadoria, @vlQtdeRemessa, @vlPesoLiqRemessa, @vlPesoBtoRemessa    WHILE @@fetch_status = 0  BEGIN    SELECT      @vlQtdePedido = ROUND(QT_FORN_PEDIDO, 2),      @vlPesoLiqPedido = ROUND(VL_PL_TOTAL, 2),      @vlPesoBtoPedido = ROUND(VL_PB_TOTAL, 2)    FROM TPE_ITEM (NOLOCK)    WHERE RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP))+RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_RAP_ANO)) = @nrRap      AND RTRIM(LTRIM(NR_PEDIDO)) = @cdPedido      AND RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_GRUPO)) = @nrGrupo      AND RTRIM(LTRIM(NR_ITEM)) = @cdItem      AND RTRIM(LTRIM(CD_PRODUTO)) = @cdMercadoria      IF (@vlQtdePedido <> @vlQtdeRemessa) OR (@vlPesoLiqPedido <> @vlPesoLiqRemessa) OR (@vlPesoBtoPedido <> @vlPesoBtoRemessa)    BEGIN      SET @inReemissao = '1'    END      FETCH cRemessa INTO @cdPedido, @cdItem, @cdMercadoria, @vlQtdeRemessa, @vlPesoLiqRemessa, @vlPesoBtoRemessa  END    CLOSE cRemessa  DEALLOCATE cRemessa    RETURN(@inReemissao)  /*  PRINT @inReemissao  ROLLBACK TRAN  --*/

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_renamediagram   (    @diagramname   sysname,    @owner_id  int = null,    @new_diagramname sysname      )   WITH EXECUTE AS 'dbo'   AS   BEGIN    set nocount on    declare @theId    int    declare @IsDbo    int        declare @UIDFound   int    declare @DiagId   int    declare @DiagIdTarg  int    declare @u_name   sysname    if((@diagramname is null) or (@new_diagramname is null))    begin     RAISERROR ('Invalid value', 16, 1);     return -1    end       EXECUTE AS CALLER;    select @theId = DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID();    select @IsDbo = IS_MEMBER(N'db_owner');     if(@owner_id is null)     select @owner_id = @theId;    REVERT;       select @u_name = USER_NAME(@owner_id)       select @DiagId = diagram_id, @UIDFound = principal_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @diagramname     if(@DiagId IS NULL or (@IsDbo = 0 and @UIDFound <> @theId))    begin     RAISERROR ('Diagram does not exist or you do not have permission.', 16, 1)     return -3    end       -- if((@u_name is not null) and (@new_diagramname = @diagramname)) -- nothing will change    -- return 0;       if(@u_name is null)     select @DiagIdTarg = diagram_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @theId and name = @new_diagramname    else     select @DiagIdTarg = diagram_id from dbo.sysdiagrams where principal_id = @owner_id and name = @new_diagramname       if((@DiagIdTarg is not null) and  @DiagId <> @DiagIdTarg)    begin     RAISERROR ('The name is already used.', 16, 1);     return -2    end         if(@u_name is null)     update dbo.sysdiagrams set [name] = @new_diagramname, principal_id = @theId where diagram_id = @DiagId    else     update dbo.sysdiagrams set [name] = @new_diagramname where diagram_id = @DiagId    return 0   END

CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.sp_upgraddiagrams   AS   BEGIN    IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.sysdiagrams') IS NOT NULL     return 0;       CREATE TABLE dbo.sysdiagrams    (     name sysname NOT NULL,     principal_id int NOT NULL, -- we may change it to varbinary(85)     diagram_id int PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY,     version int,        definition varbinary(max)     CONSTRAINT UK_principal_name UNIQUE     (      principal_id,      name     )    );        /* Add this if we need to have some form of extended properties for diagrams */    /*    IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.sysdiagram_properties') IS NULL    BEGIN     CREATE TABLE dbo.sysdiagram_properties     (      diagram_id int,      name sysname,      value varbinary(max) NOT NULL     )    END    */      IF OBJECT_ID(N'dbo.dtproperties') IS NOT NULL    begin     insert into dbo.sysdiagrams     (      [name],      [principal_id],      [version],      [definition]     )     select        convert(sysname, dgnm.[uvalue]),      DATABASE_PRINCIPAL_ID(N'dbo'),   -- will change to the sid of sa      0,       -- zero for old format, dgdef.[version],      dgdef.[lvalue]     from dbo.[dtproperties] dgnm      inner join dbo.[dtproperties] dggd on dggd.[property] = 'DtgSchemaGUID' and dggd.[objectid] = dgnm.[objectid]       inner join dbo.[dtproperties] dgdef on dgdef.[property] = 'DtgSchemaDATA' and dgdef.[objectid] = dgnm.[objectid]           where dgnm.[property] = 'DtgSchemaNAME' and dggd.[uvalue] like N'_EA3E6268-D998-11CE-9454-00AA00A3F36E_'      return 2;    end    return 1;   END

/*-------------------------------------------------------------------------------  Stored Procedure: sp_view_codigo_vago   Objetivo: procura códigos vagos no caso do novo código ser maior que a quantidade            de personalizações existentes no menu/sub-menu e assim evitar um String            Truncated.  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/  /**/  CREATE PROCEDURE sp_view_codigo_vago (    @cd_usuario char(4),    @cd_menu    char(2),    @cd_subm    char(2),    @cd_view_nr int output  ) AS  --*/  /*  DECLARE    @cd_usuario char(4),    @cd_menu    char(2),    @cd_subm    char(2),    @cd_view_nr int    SET @cd_usuario = '0141'  SET @cd_menu    = '01'  SET @cd_subm    = '01'  --*/  DECLARE    @cd_view_pos char(2),    @cd_view_ant char(2),    @contador int  --seleciona os códigos das views  DECLARE cView CURSOR LOCAL FOR    SELECT SUBSTRING(M06_CD_VIEW, 11, 2)    FROM M06_VIEW (NOLOCK)    WHERE M06_CD_USUARIO = @cd_usuario      AND M06_CD_MENU    = @cd_menu      AND M06_CD_SUBM    = @cd_subm    ORDER BY M06_CD_VIEW  --zera o contador  SET @contador = 0    OPEN cView  FETCH cView INTO @cd_view_pos  --verifica o código anterior e posterio e verifica se há algum vago entre eles.  WHILE @@fetch_status = 0  BEGIN    IF @contador <> 0      BEGIN      IF (CAST(@cd_view_pos AS int) - CAST(@cd_view_ant AS int)) > 1      BEGIN        SET @cd_view_nr = CAST(@cd_view_ant AS int)+1        BREAK      END    END    SET @cd_view_ant = @cd_view_pos    SET @contador = @contador + 1      FETCH cView INTO @cd_view_pos  END    CLOSE cView  DEALLOCATE cView    IF @cd_view_nr IS NULL SET @cd_view_nr = 1  SELECT @cd_view_nr

/*Função: duplicar as personalizações de um usuário para outro.*/  /**/  CREATE PROCEDURE [dbo].[sp_view_duplica] (    @cd_codigo  varchar(12),    @cd_chave   char(1),    @cd_usuario char(4)  ) AS  --*/  /*  SET XACT_ABORT ON  BEGIN TRAN    DECLARE    @cd_codigo  char(12), --código do menu, sub-menu, usuário ou personalização a duplicar    @cd_chave   char(1),  --parte do código que será utilizado para a cópia    @cd_usuario char(4)   --usuário que vai receber a cópia    SET @cd_codigo  = '0713-0101-03'  SET @cd_chave   = '0'  SET @cd_usuario = '0713'    -- @cd_codigo = 0 ex. M06_CD_VIEW LIKE '0713-0101-01' copia a personalização  -- @cd_codigo = 1 ex. M06_CD_VIEW LIKE '0713%'        copia as personalizações do usuário  -- @cd_codigo = 2 ex. M06_CD_VIEW LIKE '0713-01%'     copia as personalizações do usuário com menu  -- @cd_codigo = 3 ex. M06_CD_VIEW LIKE '0713-0101%'   copia as personalizações do usuário com menu e sub-menu  --*/    DECLARE    @cd_view     char(12),    @nr_view     varchar(2),    @cd_menu     char(2),    @cd_subm     char(2),    @tp_exibir   char(1),    @cd_cargo    char(3),    @cd_view_new char(12)    IF @cd_chave = '0' --código da personalização  IF @cd_chave = '1' --código da usuario                  SET @cd_codigo = LEFT( @cd_codigo, 4 )  IF @cd_chave = '2' --código do menu+usuario             SET @cd_codigo = LEFT( @cd_codigo, 7 )  IF @cd_chave = '3' --código do menu+submenu+usuario     SET @cd_codigo = LEFT( @cd_codigo, 9 )    SELECT @cd_cargo = CD_CARGO FROM TUSUARIO WHERE CD_USUARIO = @cd_usuario    IF (@cd_cargo NOT IN ('001','040','055','060','088')) SET @tp_exibir = '1'  IF (@cd_cargo = '001')          SET @tp_exibir = '0'  IF (@cd_cargo = '040')          SET @tp_exibir = '2'  IF (@cd_cargo IN ('055','060')) SET @tp_exibir = '3'  IF (@cd_cargo = '088')          SET @tp_exibir = '4'      SELECT     M06_CD_VIEW    , M06_CD_MENU   , M06_CD_SUBM    , M06_CD_USUARIO, M06_NM_VIEW,    M06_IN_EMBARQUE, M06_IN_DT_PREV, M06_IN_DOWNLOAD, M06_IN_EMAIL  , M06_IN_PRINT,    M06_IN_PADRAO  , M06_IN_SYSTEM , M06_TP_RELAT   , M06_TP_QUEBRA , M06_CD_EVENTO,    M06_NR_DIAS    , M06_TX_ORDEM  , M06_IN_DOCTOS  INTO #TMP_VIEW  FROM M06_VIEW ( NOLOCK )  WHERE M06_CD_VIEW LIKE @cd_codigo + '%'     IF ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM #TMP_VIEW ) > 0   BEGIN    WHILE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM #TMP_VIEW ) > 0    BEGIN      SELECT TOP 1        @cd_view = M06_CD_VIEW,        @cd_menu = M06_CD_MENU,        @cd_subm = M06_CD_SUBM      FROM #TMP_VIEW        -- cria o código da nova personalização      SELECT @nr_view = ISNULL(CONVERT( varchar(2), CONVERT( int, RIGHT( MAX(M06_CD_VIEW), 2 ) )+1 ), 1)      FROM M06_VIEW ( TABLOCK HOLDLOCK )      WHERE M06_CD_MENU    = @cd_menu       AND M06_CD_SUBM    = @cd_subm       AND M06_CD_USUARIO = @cd_usuario        SET @cd_view_new = @cd_usuario+'-'+@cd_menu+@cd_subm+'-'+RIGHT( '00'+ @nr_view, 2 )        -- inclui a nova personalização      INSERT INTO M06_VIEW (        M06_CD_VIEW    , M06_CD_MENU   , M06_CD_SUBM    , M06_CD_USUARIO, M06_NM_VIEW,       M06_IN_EMBARQUE, M06_IN_DT_PREV, M06_IN_DOWNLOAD, M06_IN_EMAIL  , M06_IN_PRINT,       M06_IN_PADRAO  , M06_IN_SYSTEM , M06_TP_RELAT   , M06_TP_QUEBRA , M06_CD_EVENTO,       M06_NR_DIAS    , M06_TX_ORDEM  , M06_IN_DOCTOS , M06_TP_LIMITADOR, M06_HR_FREQ_DIARIA,        M06_FREQ_OCORRE_TODOS, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SEG, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_TER, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_QUA,       M06_FREQ_OCORRE_QUI, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SEX, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_SAB, M06_FREQ_OCORRE_DOM, M06_DIAS_FREQ_OCORRE,        M06_CD_ARQUIVO, M06_CD_GRUPO, M06_CD_CLIENTE, M06_CD_MODAL, M06_CD_UNIDADE, M06_CD_TRANSP,       M06_CD_AREA, M06_CD_CELULA, M06_CD_ARMADOR, M06_CD_IMPORTADOR,       M06_TP_LIMITADOR_AUX, M06_CD_EVENTO_2, M06_TP_LIMITADOR_2, M06_TP_LIMITADOR_AUX_2, M06_NR_DIAS_2, M06_TP_ORDEM, M06_CD_CAMPO     )      SELECT       @cd_view_new   , M06_CD_MENU   , M06_CD_SUBM    , @cd_usuario   , M06_NM_VIEW,       M06_IN_EMBARQUE, M06_IN_DT_PREV, M06_IN_DOWNLOAD, M06_IN_EMAIL  , M06_IN_PRINT,       M06_IN_PAD

CREATE PROCEDURE spWriteStringToFile   (  @String Varchar(8000), --8000 in SQL Server 2000  @Path VARCHAR(255),  @Filename VARCHAR(100)    --  )  AS  DECLARE  @objFileSystem int          ,@objTextStream int,    @objErrorObject int,    @strErrorMessage Varchar(1000),       @Command varchar(1000),       @hr int,    @fileAndPath varchar(80)    set nocount on    select @strErrorMessage='opening the File System Object'  EXECUTE @hr = sp_OACreate  'Scripting.FileSystemObject' , @objFileSystem OUT    Select @FileAndPath=@path+'\'+@filename  if @HR=0 Select @objErrorObject=@objFileSystem , @strErrorMessage='Creating file "'+@FileAndPath+'"'  if @HR=0 execute @hr = sp_OAMethod   @objFileSystem   , 'CreateTextFile'   , @objTextStream OUT, @FileAndPath,2,True    if @HR=0 Select @objErrorObject=@objTextStream,    @strErrorMessage='writing to the file "'+@FileAndPath+'"'  if @HR=0 execute @hr = sp_OAMethod  @objTextStream, 'Write', Null, @String    if @HR=0 Select @objErrorObject=@objTextStream, @strErrorMessage='closing the file "'+@FileAndPath+'"'  if @HR=0 execute @hr = sp_OAMethod  @objTextStream, 'Close'    if @hr<>0   begin   Declare     @Source varchar(255),    @Description Varchar(255),    @Helpfile Varchar(255),    @HelpID int      EXECUTE sp_OAGetErrorInfo  @objErrorObject,     @source output,@Description output,@Helpfile output,@HelpID output   Select @strErrorMessage='Error whilst '     +coalesce(@strErrorMessage,'doing something')     +', '+coalesce(@Description,'')   raiserror (@strErrorMessage,16,1)   end  EXECUTE  sp_OADestroy @objTextStream  EXECUTE sp_OADestroy @objTextStream
